subtitles.original: 花びら舞い散る 記憶舞い戻る
subtitles.english: Cherry blossom petals dance and scatter, memories dance and return.

subtitles.original: 花びら舞い散る 記憶舞い戻る
subtitles.english: Cherry blossom petals dance and scatter, memories dance and return.

subtitles.original: 花びら舞い散る 記憶舞い戻る
subtitles.english: Cherry blossom petals dance and scatter, memories dance and return.

subtitles.original: 花びら舞い散る 記憶舞い戻る
subtitles.english: Cherry blossom petals dance and scatter, memories dance and return.

subtitles.original: 花びら舞い散る 記憶舞い戻る
subtitles.english: Cherry blossom petals dance and scatter, memories dance and return.

subtitles.original: 花びら舞い散る
subtitles.english: Cherry blossom petals dance and scatter.

subtitles.original: 人はこれって時にどうしても
subtitles.english: I wonder why people always say,

subtitles.original: 「時間を戻せたら」とかいうね
subtitles.english: "if only we could turn back the hands of time..."

subtitles.original: でも誰も直せないよ 治せないんだな
subtitles.english: yet it's impossible and it always has been.

subtitles.original: 昔からそうだし まぁしょうがないね
subtitles.english: Life can get tough, so we might as well enjoy it.

subtitles.original: きっと先は深くて不安定
subtitles.english: The future is surely deep and unstable,

subtitles.original: でも お行儀よくちゃつまんないね
subtitles.english: but being well-behaved is so boring.

subtitles.original: タイムマシーンに乗り込んで
subtitles.english: So let's hop in a time machine

subtitles.original: トラベラーになれたら
subtitles.english: and become a traveler.

subtitles.original: 箱の中の猫を思っても
subtitles.english: Even if we think about the cat in the box,

subtitles.original: 後悔だけが胸を焦がして
subtitles.english: only regret burns our chests,

subtitles.original: いつもあの猜疑心が遮るんだわ
subtitles.english: and that doubt always gets in the way.

subtitles.original: 昔からそうだし まぁしょうがないね
subtitles.english: It's always been like that, so we might as well enjoy it.

subtitles.original: きっと先は深くて不安定
subtitles.english: The future is surely deep and unstable,

subtitles.original: でも お行儀よくちゃつまんないね
subtitles.english: but being well-behaved is so boring.

subtitles.original: タイムマシーンに乗り込んで
subtitles.english: So let's hop in a time machine

subtitles.original: トラベラーになれたら
subtitles.english: and become a traveler.

subtitles.original: どこをどうやってもね
subtitles.english: No matter what we do where,

subtitles.original: 時間ってのは戻せない
subtitles.english: time cannot be turned back.

subtitles.original: レンズ越し未来にめがけて
subtitles.english: Aiming through the lens to the future,

subtitles.original: ピースサイン伝えてる 今のところいい調子
subtitles.english: I'm sending a peace sign, so far so good.

subtitles.original: 青春の1ページも
subtitles.english: Even a page of youth

subtitles.original: たったの1ページで
subtitles.english: is just one page,

subtitles.original: 自慢の人生のハイライトも 一夜きりの Tweet の buzz みたい
subtitles.english:
and the highlight of my proud life
is like a one-night Tweet buzz.

subtitles.original: 君と出会った日のことを覚えてるよ
subtitles.english: I remember the day I met you.

subtitles.original: イヤフォン垂らしてこの曲をきいていたよ
subtitles.english: I was listening to this song with earphones dangling.

subtitles.original: あれから数えて今日は何年目!?
subtitles.english: Counting from then, what year is it today!?

subtitles.original: 今じゃ足跡どこも残るから これは歌詞カード
subtitles.english: Since footprints remain everywhere now, this is a lyric card.

subtitles.original: 載せず鍵かけておこう ＃％＆＄”＝〜 ほにゃららむにゃらこぽんぽこ
subtitles.english: Let's keep it locked up, #%&$~ gibberish.

subtitles.original: ほらね、聴き取れない!!
subtitles.english: See? You can't hear it!

subtitles.original: 皆いつもくよくよ悩み
subtitles.english: Everyone is always worrying,

subtitles.original: 締め切りに追われ歴史を作り
subtitles.english: chased by deadlines, making history,

subtitles.original: 弱さを無理やりごまかし
subtitles.english: forcibly cheating our weakness.

subtitles.original: 君の芝生は緑 青じゃなくていい
subtitles.english: Your lawn is green, it doesn't have to be blue.

subtitles.original: アイドル撮られちゃった真冬の空に
subtitles.english: The idol got photographed in the midwinter sky,

subtitles.original: 政治家ぶれてブレちゃった帰り道
subtitles.english: and the politician shook and faltered on the way home,

subtitles.original: とうちゃんローン組んだみはてぬ先
subtitles.english: Dad took out a loan for an endless future.

subtitles.original: でも時は全部を流して
subtitles.english: But time washes everything away.

subtitles.original: 人はこれって時にどうしても
subtitles.english: I wonder why people always say,

subtitles.original: 「時間を戻せたら」とかいうね
subtitles.english: "if only we could turn back the hands of time..."

subtitles.original: 残誰も直せないよ 治せないんだな
subtitles.english: yet it's impossible and it always has been.

subtitles.original: 昔からそうだし まぁしょうがないね
subtitles.english: Life can get tough, so we might as well enjoy it.

subtitles.original: きっと先は深くて不安定
subtitles.english: The future is surely deep and unstable,

subtitles.original: でも お行儀よくちゃつまんないね
subtitles.english: but being well-behaved is so boring.

subtitles.original: タイムマシーンに乗り込んで
subtitles.english: So let's hop in a time machine

subtitles.original: トラベラーになれたら
subtitles.english: and become a traveler.

subtitles.original: 俺ってやつはいつも気づいた時は手遅れ
subtitles.english: A guy like me is always too late when he realizes,

subtitles.original: 絵空事ばかりうつつ抜かして
subtitles.english: losing myself in nothing but fantasies,

subtitles.original: 大事な人すら救えない
subtitles.english: unable to save even the people who matter.

subtitles.original: だからこんな歌で自分に言い聞かして
subtitles.english: So I tell myself with a song like this.

subtitles.original: あの時 あいつは多分 気を使って
subtitles.english: Back then, he was probably being considerate,

subtitles.original: とくに顔色変えず 何もないふり
subtitles.english: not changing his expression, pretending nothing happened.

subtitles.original: なんで言わないんだって ムカついてもね
subtitles.english: Even if I get annoyed wondering why he didn't say anything,

subtitles.original: やさしさからきてたなら しょうがないね
subtitles.english: if it came from kindness, it can't be helped.

subtitles.original: 願わくばディスコで親父と母さんが会った日に行きたいね
subtitles.english:
Hopefully, I want to go to the day my
dad and mom met at a disco.

subtitles.original: 後ろのジョックスに酒 かけて息子じきじきにチャンス作ってやるぜ
subtitles.english:
I'll pour alcohol on the jocks in the back
and make a chance myself as their son.

subtitles.original: どんなでかい時計だってすべてさ 始まりはこんな小さい歯車
subtitles.english:
No matter how huge a clock is, everything starts
with such a small gear.

subtitles.original: 細かいことはもういいや 疲れた
subtitles.english: I'm done with the details, I'm tired.

subtitles.original: 別に怒ってないってさ未来は
subtitles.english: The future says it's not particularly mad at me.

subtitles.original: 人はこれって時にどうしても
subtitles.english: I wonder why people always say,

subtitles.original: 「時間を戻せたら」とかいうね
subtitles.english: "if only we could turn back the hands of time..."

subtitles.original: でも誰も直せないよ 治せないんだな
subtitles.english: yet it's impossible and it always has been.

subtitles.original: 昔からそうだし まぁしょうがないね
subtitles.english: Life can get tough, so we might as well enjoy it.

First, I identified the song "Sakura" (さくら) at the beginning, noting the burnt-in lyrics. I then meticulously traced the lyrics and timestamps of "花びら舞い散る 記憶舞い戻る" (Cherry blossom petals dance and scatter, memories dance and return) across those first 43 seconds. I double-checked the audio at various points to confirm the timing and accuracy, and I validated both the on-screen text and the sung lyric, confirming they both match.

Then, at 00:43.000 to 00:56.000, there's silence and sound effects that I don't need to create any subtitles for.

At 00:56.000, a transition happens.
